project_type: Document generation - Python script producing a .docx PhD proposal
test_framework: None - verification is file generation and format validation
test_command: python3 -c "from docx import Document; doc = Document('phd-itb-2026/proposal_disertasi.docx'); print(f'Sections: {len(doc.sections)}, Paragraphs: {len(doc.paragraphs)}')"
verification_instructions: 1. Run the generation script. 2. Verify the .docx file exists in phd-itb-2026/. 3. Open and validate formatting (Times New Roman 12pt, 1.5 spacing, proper headings).
snapshot_or_generated_files: phd-itb-2026/proposal_disertasi.docx - generated by the Python script
environment_constraints: Python 3.9 available. python-docx 1.2.0 installed. Open internet for research.
contribution_requirements: Output must be in Bahasa Indonesia, formal academic style, ITB PhD proposal format
key_patterns: Use python-docx library to create Word document with proper academic formatting
directory_structure: Root contains README.md. New folder phd-itb-2026/ will contain the output .docx file. A Python script at root generates the document.
